normal_equation_cache.reuse: D, D^dagger, and D^dagger D are built once per needed mass/source per configuration and reused across point-source and stochastic RHS solves
normal_equation_cache.scope: per saved gauge configuration and smeared measurement gauge

fh_lsz_measurement_policy.strict_limit: Selected-mass source-coordinate FH/LSZ target time series are performance/instrumentation support only; they are not physical y_t evidence until canonical-Higgs/source-overlap or W/Z response identity gates close.

scalar_source_response_analysis.multi_tau_target_timeseries_rule: diagnostic per-configuration adjacent-time effective-energy slopes for response-window covariance gates; not a readout switch and not a physical dE/dh observable
scalar_source_response_analysis.source_coordinate: uniform additive lattice scalar source s entering the Dirac mass as m_bare + s
scalar_source_response_analysis.strict_limit: dE/ds is not dE/dh until kappa_s is derived by scalar LSZ/canonical normalization
scalar_source_response_analysis.target_timeseries_rule: diagnostic per-configuration tau=1 effective-energy slopes for autocorrelation/ESS gates; not a physical dE/dh readout

scalar_two_point_lsz_analysis.estimator: Z2 stochastic trace estimator; production evidence requires saved ensembles and controlled statistics

noise_subsample_stability.strict_limit: Noise subsample stability is an estimator diagnostic only; it is not production evidence or scalar LSZ normalization without same-source production statistics and pole/FV/IR control.

scalar_two_point_lsz_analysis.source_coordinate: same uniform additive lattice scalar source s entering m_bare + s
scalar_two_point_lsz_analysis.strict_limit: finite-mode stochastic C_ss(q) is not kappa_s until an isolated pole, dGamma/dp^2 at the pole, and canonical Higgs normalization are derived

source_higgs_cross_correlator_analysis.measurement_object: same-ensemble C_ss/C_sx/C_xx(q) rows for the supplied taste-radial second-source certificate

operator.identity_certificate: same-surface source-vertex certificate only; canonical O_H identity absent
operator.normalization_certificate: source_norm_matched: on the cold Cl(3)/Z^3 surface Tr X^dagger X equals Tr I^dagger I over site-color degrees of freedom.  This is not scalar LSZ or canonical Higgs normalization.
operator.operator_definition: Gauge-covariant blocked-hypercube taste-radial source X=(X_1+X_2+X_3)/sqrt(3), where X_i flips the spatial parity bit inside each 2^3 Cl(3)/Z^3 block using the connecting SU(3) link.

source_higgs_cross_correlator_analysis.source_coordinate: same uniform additive lattice scalar source s entering m_bare + s
source_higgs_cross_correlator_analysis.strict_limit: This analysis emits finite-momentum cross-correlator rows.  It does not supply pole residues, Gram-purity closure, or retained y_t authorization without the source-Higgs certificate builder and postprocessor gates.

two_source_taste_radial_row_aliases.strict_limit: C_sx/C_xx aliases are second-source taste-radial rows.  They are not canonical-Higgs C_sH/C_HH rows unless a separate canonical O_H/source-overlap bridge passes.

top_mass_scan_response_analysis.source_coordinate: uniform additive Dirac bare mass m_bare
top_mass_scan_response_analysis.strict_limit: Per-configuration top mass-scan slopes are same-ensemble response support for future covariance/subtraction gates only. They are not dE/dh, not kappa_s, and not physical y_t evidence without canonical-Higgs/source-overlap or W/Z response identity authority.

normal_equation_cache.reuse: D, D^dagger, and D^dagger D are built once per needed mass/source per configuration and reused across point-source and stochastic RHS solves
normal_equation_cache.scope: per saved gauge configuration and smeared measurement gauge

fh_lsz_measurement_policy.strict_limit: Selected-mass source-coordinate FH/LSZ target time series are performance/instrumentation support only; they are not physical y_t evidence until canonical-Higgs/source-overlap or W/Z response identity gates close.

metadata.running_bridge: production certificate must supply authoritative 4/5-loop bridge

scalar_source_response.source_coordinate: uniform additive lattice scalar source s entering the Dirac mass as m_bare + s

scalar_two_point_lsz.measurement_object: C_ss(q)=Tr[S V_q S V_-q] for the same additive scalar source

metadata.scale_anchor: Sommer r0 = 0.5 fm external anchor; r0/a reference used for production run

required_measurement_objects: neutral scalar kernel partition K=[[A,B^T],[B,C]] on the same Cl3/Z3 surface
A(pole) and A_prime(pole) for the source-pole coordinate
B(pole) and B_prime(pole) for source-orthogonal neutral mixing
C(pole), C_prime(pole), and C_inverse(pole) for the orthogonal neutral block
pole isolation, finite-volume, finite-spacing, model-class, and identity certificates
schur_kprime_kernel_rows.strict_limit: Same-source C_ss(q) rows and finite source-response slopes must not be treated as Schur A/B/C kernel rows or as a K-prime closure certificate.  The Schur sufficiency theorem requires explicit same-surface kernel partition rows and pole derivatives.

operator.identity_certificate: same-surface source-vertex certificate only; canonical O_H identity absent
operator.normalization_certificate: source_norm_matched: on the cold Cl(3)/Z^3 surface Tr X^dagger X equals Tr I^dagger I over site-color degrees of freedom.  This is not scalar LSZ or canonical Higgs normalization.
operator.operator_definition: Gauge-covariant blocked-hypercube taste-radial source X=(X_1+X_2+X_3)/sqrt(3), where X_i flips the spatial parity bit inside each 2^3 Cl(3)/Z^3 block using the connecting SU(3) link.

required_measurement_objects: O_H or radial canonical-Higgs observable on the same Cl3/Z3 source surface
source_higgs_cross_correlator.strict_limit: Finite-mode source-Higgs rows are not pole residues and must not be treated as source-Higgs Gram purity or canonical-Higgs normalization evidence until the source-Higgs certificate builder, Gram-purity postprocessor, and retained-route gates pass.

operator.identity_certificate: same-surface source-vertex certificate only; canonical O_H identity absent
operator.normalization_certificate: source_norm_matched: on the cold Cl(3)/Z^3 surface Tr X^dagger X equals Tr I^dagger I over site-color degrees of freedom.  This is not scalar LSZ or canonical Higgs normalization.
operator.operator_definition: Gauge-covariant blocked-hypercube taste-radial source X=(X_1+X_2+X_3)/sqrt(3), where X_i flips the spatial parity bit inside each 2^3 Cl(3)/Z^3 block using the connecting SU(3) link.

required_measurement_objects: same-surface Euclidean-time C_ss(t), C_sH(t), C_Hs(t), C_HH(t) rows
same-source covariance across matrix entries and time lags
canonical O_H or physical neutral transfer identity certificate
OS/GEVP pole extraction with FV/IR/threshold authority
source_higgs_time_kernel.strict_limit: Same-surface time-kernel rows are transfer-kernel/GEVP instrumentation only. They must not be treated as physical source-Higgs pole residues, kappa_s, or y_t evidence until canonical O_H or physical neutral transfer identity, pole/FV/IR/threshold authority, overlap normalization, and retained-route gates pass.

top_mass_scan_response.source_coordinate: uniform additive Dirac bare mass m_bare
top_mass_scan_response.strict_limit: This serializes per-configuration top mass-scan slopes already computed for the three-mass scan. It is future same-ensemble covariance/subtraction support only, not dE/dh and not a retained/proposed-retained y_t readout.

required_measurement_objects: fitted dM_W/ds or dM_Z/ds under the same scalar source
wz_mass_response.strict_limit: The optional W/Z smoke path emits synthetic positive correlators for schema validation only.  This QCD top-correlator harness still does not produce same-source EW W/Z mass-response evidence.  Static EW algebra, smoke slopes, or absent W/Z slopes must not be used as dM_W/ds physics evidence.
